Localization.Description: A suspicious file was created using a remote access tool

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} created a suspicious file {object.name} using the remote access utility {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}. Tool artifact: hash sum (utility: {datafield9})
User {subject.account.name} created a suspicious file {object.name} using the remote access utility {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}. Tool artifact: process name ({datafield9})
